purpose: Manual force-stop checkpoints for MD-021 primary recovery and MD-022 key rotation.

checkpoints.seedState: Existing synced account on old primary; new mobile device starts account recovery.
checkpoints.forceStopWhen: The recovery UI pauses after registering this device.
checkpoints.expectedResume: Relaunch resumes from the pending-primary-recovery journal; old primary remains active until finalize succeeds.
checkpoints.serverVerification: primary_recovery_attempts.status moves from pending to finalized; accounts.active_primary_device_id becomes the new device only after resume completes.

checkpoints.scenario: Primary recovery local empty state written.
checkpoints.forceStopWhen: The recovery UI pauses after local security, Drive settings, and pending primary local sync state are saved.
checkpoints.expectedResume: Relaunch keeps the pending device and continues secret save plus data restore.
checkpoints.serverVerification: Pending recovery attempt remains pending until resume completes.

checkpoints.forceStopWhen: The recovery UI pauses after recovered root key and device private key are saved to encrypted sync secret storage.
checkpoints.expectedResume: Relaunch restores encrypted data without asking for the recovery passphrase again.
checkpoints.serverVerification: New pending device cursor advances after restore; no old primary revocation before finalize.

checkpoints.scenario: Primary recovery partition or snapshot restore completed.
checkpoints.seedState: Same as MD-021 baseline; optionally add a new note on old primary before relaunch to create a stale tail.
checkpoints.forceStopWhen: The recovery UI pauses after data restore and before cursor/finalize.
checkpoints.expectedResume: Relaunch updates cursor, replays any stale tail, finalizes, and clears the journal.

checkpoints.seedState: Same as MD-021 baseline; add a new note on old primary while the new device is paused to force stale finalize.
checkpoints.forceStopWhen: The recovery UI pauses after update_device_cursor and before finalize.
checkpoints.expectedResume: Relaunch retries finalize, replays stale tail if needed, updates cursor again, and finalizes.

checkpoints.scenario: Primary recovery server finalized before local cleanup.
checkpoints.forceStopWhen: The recovery UI pauses immediately after finalize_primary_mobile_recovery succeeds.
checkpoints.expectedResume: Relaunch treats already-finalized recovery as completed, promotes local state, and clears the journal.
checkpoints.serverVerification: Old primary devices are revoked and new primary device activation_state is active.

checkpoints.scenario: Key rotation reserved before recovery package commit.
checkpoints.seedState: Primary account with at least one active companion target device and current recovery passphrase.
checkpoints.forceStopWhen: The revocation flow pauses after begin_device_key_rotation.
checkpoints.expectedResume: Relaunch aborts the pending rotation because no recovery package was committed; target remains active.
checkpoints.serverVerification: key_epoch_rotations.status becomes aborted; accounts.current_key_epoch is unchanged.

checkpoints.forceStopWhen: The revocation flow pauses after the next-epoch recovery key package metadata commits.
checkpoints.expectedResume: Relaunch continues companion packages, stages future key, finalizes, revokes target, and clears journal.
checkpoints.serverVerification: sync_objects contains key-epoch-recovery operation; key_epoch_rotations.status becomes finalized.

checkpoints.seedState: Same as MD-022 baseline, with at least one surviving companion if possible.
checkpoints.forceStopWhen: The revocation flow pauses after all remaining active companions receive next-epoch packages.
checkpoints.expectedResume: Relaunch stages the future key locally, finalizes, revokes target, and clears journal.
checkpoints.serverVerification: sync_objects contains key-epoch packages for each non-revoked companion.

checkpoints.forceStopWhen: The revocation flow pauses after local sync secrets contain the next epoch key.
checkpoints.expectedResume: Relaunch finalizes server rotation and promotes local key epoch.
checkpoints.serverVerification: accounts.current_key_epoch advances after resume and target device is revoked.

checkpoints.scenario: Key rotation server finalized before local promotion cleanup.
checkpoints.forceStopWhen: The revocation flow pauses immediately after finalize_device_key_rotation succeeds.
checkpoints.expectedResume: Relaunch promotes the finalized epoch locally, updates cursor if needed, and clears journal.
checkpoints.serverVerification: key_epoch_rotations.status is finalized and device_revocations has the target device.
